channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: President Ruto pledges firm campaign stance against opposition ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: President William Ruto has declared that he is fully prepared to face the united opposition in the 2027 General Election while on a four-day tour of Kenya’s Coast region. Speaking during his visit to ...

item.title: ACT firefighters conduct large-scale rescue drill to prepare for mass casualty emergencies
item.description: ACT Fire & Rescue (ACTFR) recently carried out a large-scale night-time training exercise in Hume designed to prepare third-year firefighters for major emergency incidents involving multiple casualtie...

item.title: Latvian Beach Volleyball Team Defeats USA in Nuvali Challenge to Advance to Quarterfinals
item.description: In the ongoing Nuvali Challenge beach volleyball tournament, the Latvian pair achieved a notable victory by defeating the second-seeded team from the United States. This win allowed the Latvians to se...

item.title: Trump Says U.S. and Iran Are Nearing a Peace Agreement Involving Regional Leaders
item.description: President Donald Trump announced from the Oval Office that the United States is close to finalizing a major diplomatic agreement involving Iran and several countries in the Middle East and South Asia....

item.title: Celtic secure Scottish Cup to complete domestic double with 3-1 win over Dunfermline
item.description: Celtic have completed a successful domestic double after defeating Dunfermline Athletic 3-1 in the Scottish Cup final played at Hampden Park. The victory secured their 14th domestic double and confirm...

item.title: Review Says Drake’s ‘Iceman’ Is Overshadowed by Grievances and Rap Beef Complaints
item.description: The article reviews Drake’s new 43-song project, split into three albums titled “Iceman,” “Habibti,” and “Maid of Honour.” While acknowledging Drake’s continued commercial dominance and ability to pro...

item.title: Canadians detained after Gaza flotilla interception to return home via Turkey
item.description: Several Canadians who were part of a flotilla attempting to deliver symbolic humanitarian aid to Gaza are expected to return to Canada this weekend after being detained by Israeli forces. According to...

item.title: Former Blue Peter presenter John Leslie living and working as DJ in Praia da Luz, Portugal
item.description: The article explores the current life of former television presenter John Leslie, best known for his time on children's programme Blue Peter and later mainstream shows such as Wheel of Fortune and Thi...

item.title: Republican Senators Reject Trump's Funding Request for January 6 Rioters in Major Budget Deal
item.description: Di matter wey happen for American Senate dis week na serious one. Republican senators wey dey tire of President Donald Trump plenty demands finally stand up and say no. Dem close di session and go hom...

item.title: AI whole-body mapping study links obesity to facial nerve damage and systemic inflammation
item.description: Researchers from Helmholtz Munich, Ludwig Maximilians University Munich, and partner institutions have developed an advanced artificial intelligence system called MouseMapper that can analyze and map ...

item.title: Luis Manzano reacts to offensive remark made by Rave on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: The article reports on a tense and uncomfortable moment involving TV host Luis Manzano during an episode of the game show Kapamilya Deal or No Deal. According to the report, Luis reportedly felt insul...

item.title: Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick calls for congressional oversight of Trump’s $1.776B Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Republican Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick of Pennsylvania publicly criticized President Donald Trump’s proposed $1.776 billion “Anti-Weaponization Fund,” describing it as fundamentally flawed and urging Congr...

item.title: Trump-backed Republican primary wins signal party strength but raise risks ahead of US midterm elections
item.description: Republican candidates backed by US President Donald Trump have performed strongly across recent primary contests in several states, reinforcing his continued influence over the party’s base. These vic...

item.title: India and Canada to hold free trade talks as Indian commerce minister visits Ottawa to meet Mark Carney
item.description: India and Canada are set to advance discussions on a proposed free trade agreement during an upcoming visit by India’s Commerce and Industry Minister, Piyush Goyal. The talks are scheduled to take pla...

item.title: Agusan del Sur prepares for historic debut as host of Palarong Pambansa
item.description: Agusan del Sur is set to mark a major milestone as it prepares to host the Palarong Pambansa for the very first time. The announcement highlights the province’s readiness and enthusiasm in welcoming t...

item.title: Tinubu Wins APC Presidential Primary in Gombe State With 450,517 Votes
item.description: President Bola Tinubu recorded a major victory during the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary election held in Gombe State on Saturday, after polling a total of 450,517 votes across t...

item.title: Reform UK proposes removing income tax on overtime pay for eligible workers
item.description: Reform UK has proposed a policy to remove income tax on overtime earnings for workers who earn less than £75,000 and work more than a standard 40-hour week. The party describes the initiative as a “ha...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club seeks talks with Centre after eviction notice to vacate Lutyens’ Delhi premises
item.description: The Delhi Gymkhana Club has approached the Union government seeking an urgent meeting after receiving an eviction notice directing it to vacate its 27.3-acre premises in Lutyens’ Delhi by June 5. The ...

item.title: Jane Wyman's Early Career: Photos from Her Time as a Warner Bros. Contract Player in the 1930s
item.description: Jane Wyman, born Sarah Jane Mayfield on January 5, 1917, was an accomplished American actress who enjoyed success in both film and television. She earned an Academy Award for Best Actress, multiple Go...

item.title: Canada and International Allies Urge Israel to Halt West Bank Settlement Expansion
item.description: Canada, along with several allied countries including Australia, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, and the United Kingdom, has issued a joint statement condemning Israel's ...
